title: ChatGPT Work targets data-science workflows
summary: OpenAI describes how data-science teams can use ChatGPT Work to turn dashboards, exports, experiment notes and business context into first-draft analysis materials, with charts, caveats, links and review questions.
friendlySummary: OpenAI shows how data teams can use ChatGPT Work to make a first draft from dashboards, data files and notes.
whyItMatters: It is a useful example of where AI may fit best in analytical work: assembling a reviewable starting point while people remain responsible for validation, interpretation and decisions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may reduce the time spent putting reports together, while people still check the numbers and make the final decisions.
